sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Sealed Air stock trades steady as cost actions support margins and cash flow
feed.summary: Sealed Air (SEE) stock is trading steadily due to effective cost management and restructuring efforts, which are improving margins and free cash flow despite a slight decline in sales volumes. The company's adjusted EBITDA and operating income have shown year-on-year growth, driven by efficiency measures and lower input costs. Sealed Air also emphasizes innovation in sustainable packaging and automation solutions to support long-term growth and deepen customer relationships.

feed.title: General Dynamics stock hits all-time high at 381.18 USD
feed.summary: General Dynamics (GD) stock has reached an all-time high of $381.18, further climbing to $383.15, reflecting strong investor confidence and a 20.11% increase over the past year. Jefferies has raised its price target to $440, citing robust aerospace margins and a favorable outlook, while increased options trading activity indicates heightened market interest in the company. The aerospace and defense giant maintains a "GREAT" financial health score and has consistently raised its dividend for 12 consecutive years.

feed.title: RBC Capital downgrades Northern Trust to Hold-equivalent after Q2 earnings (NTRS:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: RBC Capital Markets downgraded Northern Trust (NTRS) to Hold-equivalent following its Q2 earnings report. The downgrade is attributed to valuation concerns and an anticipated slowdown in revenue growth for 2027. Ahead of market open, Northern Trust's shares were down 2.37% at $174.42.

feed.title: Apple Store app adds 'virtual shopping assistant' to improve experience
feed.summary: Apple is integrating a virtual shopping assistant powered by artificial intelligence into its Apple Store app. This new feature aims to enhance the user experience by providing assistance through a chat interface. The development was revealed via a legal update posted on the company's website.

feed.title: WEC Maintains Overweight Rating -- Price Target Lowered to $117
feed.summary: Keybanc has maintained an Overweight rating for WEC Energy Group (WEC) but lowered its price target to $117 from $126, reflecting a cautious adjustment amidst market changes. GuruFocus assesses WEC as approximately 4.5% overvalued with a GF Value™ of $108.59 against a current price of $113.46, despite a strong GF Score™ of 80/100 indicating solid profitability and growth, alongside concerns regarding financial strength and recent insider selling.

feed.title: Garrison to retire from BD at end of fiscal year
feed.summary: Dr. Michael “Mike” Garrison, executive vice president and president of the Medical Essentials and BioPharma Systems segments at BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company), is retiring after more than 20 years with the company, effective October 2. During his tenure, Garrison held several leadership roles and was instrumental in guiding BD through periods of transformation. Tom Polen, Chairman, CEO, and President of BD, expressed gratitude for Garrison’s contributions, and a search is underway for his successor in Medical Essentials, while BioPharma Systems will now report directly to Polen.

feed.title: Santander and AFC provide €100 million financing to Togo's Ministry of Finance for Italian agricultural machinery
feed.summary: Santander and Africa Finance Corporation (AFC) have provided €100 million in SACE-guaranteed financing to Togo's Ministry of Finance. This funding will facilitate the supply of Italian agricultural machinery, aligning with Italy's 'Piano Mattei per l'Africa' to integrate Italian companies into local value chains and diversify exports. The transaction underscores the growing potential for Italian technologies in emerging markets.

feed.title: Caesars Palace Online Casino Alberta Is Live: Review, Sign Up Info & More
feed.summary: Caesars Palace Online Casino has launched in Alberta, offering players over 2,000 slots, live dealer tables from Evolution and Playtech, and Caesars Rewards benefits. The platform provides a wide range of games, including exclusive Caesars-branded titles, and supports various banking methods like Interac e-Transfer. It also emphasizes responsible gambling with configurable limits and support resources.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley adds Broadcom, removes Eaton from portfolio By Investing.com
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley's Portfolio Solutions has added Broadcom Inc. to its holdings and removed Eaton Corp plc. The move reflects Morgan Stanley's strategy to gain diversified exposure to multi-year AI infrastructure spending through Broadcom's strong position in custom AI chips and infrastructure software, while also tapping into potential upside from non-AI semiconductors and stable cash flow from VMware. Eaton was removed due to its high valuation, which Morgan Stanley believes already reflects strong demand, and the portfolio's existing exposure to AI data-center power demand through Bloom Energy.

feed.title: Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP) Stock Looks About Fairly Priced After A 9% Gain
feed.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP) stock has gained 8.9% year-to-date and appears to be fairly priced around US$30 per share. Its P/E ratio of 22.4x is slightly below its tailored fair P/E ratio of 23.8x, suggesting it's neither significantly undervalued nor overvalued on an earnings basis. The market's view indicates the stock is appropriately valued, with future performance dependent on the company's ability to maintain its earnings profile and manage margins and pricing.

feed.title: Evercore ISI Adjusts Price Target on Clorox to $98 From $110, Maintains Underperform Rating
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has lowered its price target for Clorox (CLX) to $98 from $110, while maintaining an "Underperform" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a more cautious outlook from the analyst firm regarding the consumer products company. The report indicates a general trend of re-evaluation among analysts for Clorox, with several other banks also recently adjusting their price targets.

feed.title: B.Riley initiates Agomab Therapeutics stock with buy rating By Investing.com
feed.summary: B.Riley has initiated coverage on Agomab Therapeutics (NASDAQ:AGMB) with a buy rating and a price target of $34.00, citing a potential upside of nearly 200% from its current trading price of $11.60. The firm views Agomab as a first-mover in fibrostenotic Crohn’s disease, with a de-risked safety profile and a near-billion-dollar peak sales opportunity. This follows recent positive developments, including Agomab's Phase 2b NOV-ERA study design alignment with the FDA for its investigational drug ontunisertib.

feed.title: Ladenburg Thalmann Adjusts Public Service Enterprise Price Target to $80.50 From $84.50, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Ladenburg Thalmann has adjusted its price target for Public Service Enterprise Group (PSEG) to $80.50, down from $84.50, while reaffirming a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a revised outlook or valuation for the multiline utility company.

feed.title: Tractor Supply Cuts Outlook Following Tough Quarter
feed.summary: Tractor Supply has lowered its financial outlook for the current year after experiencing a challenging second quarter. The farm-and-ranch retailer now anticipates sales to increase by 2.5% to 3.5%, a reduction from its previous projection of 4% to 6%, and expects same-store sales to be flat to down 1% instead of an increase of 1% to 3%. The company plans to implement measures to improve its performance going forward.

feed.title: Dual role on Yardstick Re flood cat bond exemplifies One Moody’s strategy: CEO Fauber
feed.summary: Moody's CEO Rob Fauber highlighted the company's "One Moody's strategy" through its dual role as both rating agency and risk modeling agency for Gothaer's EUR 100 million Yardstick Re DAC flood catastrophe bond. This exemplifies how Moody's combines its ratings and catastrophe modeling expertise to address the insurance protection gap and capitalize on opportunities within the insurance-linked securities (ILS) market. The insurance vertical and risk modeling business are crucial to Moody's, with its Analytics Insurance division generating significant revenue and showing strong growth.

feed.title: Oceania Cruises® Spotlights Its Signature Wellness Discovery Tours
feed.summary: Oceania Cruises has launched over 50 Wellness Discovery Tours across Asia, Europe, and South America, catering to luxury travelers seeking rejuvenating experiences rooted in local traditions. These tours offer opportunities to engage in healing practices, mindfulness, and cultural immersion, complemented by on-board enrichment activities. The initiative reflects a growing trend where travel serves as a powerful means for personal wellbeing and discovery.

feed.title: IBM is acquiring HRL Laboratories from Boeing and GM to diversify its quantum computing bet
feed.summary: IBM is acquiring HRL Laboratories, a quantum computing research lab jointly owned by Boeing and General Motors. This acquisition will add electron spin qubits to IBM's quantum technology portfolio, diversifying its current focus on superconducting circuits. The move aims to leverage the smaller footprint of electron spin circuits, an advantage that will become significant as IBM develops more advanced quantum systems.

feed.title: Amazon Stock Trades Below Its 50-Day Average With Earnings Just a Week Away
feed.summary: Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) stock is trading below its 50-day average just one week before its Q2 earnings report. Analysts expect an EPS of $1.82 and revenue of $196.02 billion. Key metrics to watch include AWS revenue growth, advertising revenue, and North American/International retail operating income, while the stock navigates a "tug-of-war" technical zone with both bearish and bullish indicators.

feed.title: ACG leases six Boeing 737-10 jets to Aerolíneas Argentinas (BA:NYSE)
feed.summary: Aviation Capital Group (ACG) has signed lease agreements with Aerolíneas Argentinas for six Boeing 737-10 aircraft. The first delivery is scheduled for 2028. These aircraft will support the Argentine flag carrier's fleet renewal and expansion plans, increasing its capacity.

feed.title: Qualcomm Expands Snapdragon Supply for Samsung's New Galaxy Lineup
feed.summary: Qualcomm is expanding its Snapdragon platform supply for Samsung Electronics' new Galaxy lineup, including foldables, smartwatches, and smart glasses. Qualcomm will provide Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 for the new Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra, Galaxy Z Fold8, and Galaxy Z Flip8, Snapdragon Wear Elite for the Galaxy Watch9 and Galaxy Watch Ultra2, and Snapdragon AR1 Gen 1 for Samsung's intelligent eyewear. This expansion highlights a deeper collaboration between the two companies, focusing on enhancing on-device AI experiences across Samsung's diverse product portfolio.

feed.title: US Army report confirms 374Water's AirSCWO tech destroys 99.9993% of PFAS in firefighting foam
feed.summary: A US Army Corps of Engineers report has independently validated 374Water's AirSCWO technology, confirming its ability to destroy 99.9993% of PFAS chemicals found in aqueous film-forming foam (AFFF). This demonstration, conducted with Arcadis, showed the system meets strict EPA standards with near-zero harmful emissions. The validation strengthens 374Water's readiness for deployment and its plans to expand into federal and commercial PFAS remediation markets, particularly for military sites with legacy contamination.

feed.title: D-Wave Quantum to Report Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results on August 6
feed.summary: D-Wave Quantum will release its second quarter 2026 financial results on August 6, 2026, before U.S. markets open. The company will host an investor conference call featuring CEO Dr. Alan Baratz and CFO John Markovich to discuss results and business outlook. The earnings release, webcast, and conference call materials will be available on D-Wave's investor relations website.

feed.title: Massachusetts EV Drivers Could Earn Incentives for Sending Power to Grid
feed.summary: Eversource and National Grid have partnered with EnergyHub, Sunrun, and The Mobility House to test a residential vehicle-to-grid (V2G) program in Massachusetts. This initiative will allow EV drivers to enroll their V2G-capable vehicles in the existing Connected Solutions program, enabling them to send stored energy back to the grid during peak demand and earn incentives while supporting grid reliability and affordability. The program aims to leverage the growing number of EVs as mobile power banks to reduce grid strain and lower costs for all customers.

feed.title: Shinhan Financial Group Co., Ltd. Announces Quarterly Cash Dividend, Payable on August 28, 2026
feed.summary: Shinhan Financial Group Co., Ltd. has declared a quarterly cash dividend totaling KRW 347,393,176,120, which amounts to KRW 740 per share for 469,450,238 shares. The record date for this dividend is July 30, 2026, and the payment is expected to be made on August 28, 2026. This decision was made by the company's Board of Directors on July 23, 2026.

feed.title: Intuitive Shares Vision for an AI-Enabled Future of Healthcare
feed.summary: Intuitive Surgical, Inc. (NASDAQ: ISRG) outlined its vision for how artificial intelligence (AI) can transform surgical care at the Society of Robotic Surgery's annual conference. The company introduced a five-layer AI framework designed to address healthcare challenges by enhancing surgical precision, reducing variability, and extending surgeon capabilities through supervised autonomy. Intuitive also demonstrated a live telesurgery connection, showcasing real-time collaboration between surgeons in California and Georgia using the da Vinci 5 system, highlighting the potential for expanding access to specialized care.

feed.title: Sabra Health Care REIT, Inc., Publishes Sixth Annual Sustainability Report
feed.summary: Sabra Health Care REIT, Inc. has released its sixth annual Sustainability Report for fiscal year 2025, detailing progress in integrating sustainability into its business strategy. The report highlights scaling pilot technologies into portfolio-wide initiatives to improve care delivery, enhance operational efficiency, and create healthier environments for residents and staff. Key achievements include significant water conservation, deployment of autonomous cleaning robots, efficiency gains through inverter heat pump retrofits, and advancements in healthcare technology interoperability.

feed.title: Sabra Health Care REIT, Inc., Publishes Sixth Annual Sustainability Report
feed.summary: Sabra Health Care REIT, Inc. has released its sixth annual Sustainability Report for fiscal year 2025, detailing its progress in integrating sustainability into its business strategy. The report highlights successful initiatives such as water conservation through new technologies, deployment of autonomous cleaning robots, and efficiency gains from inverter heat pump retrofits. Additionally, Sabra advanced care technology interoperability and maintained a low employee turnover rate, reflecting its commitment to long-term value creation and improving quality of life for residents.

feed.title: Sabre management to discuss second-quarter results and forward outlook Aug. 6
feed.summary: Sabre (NASDAQ: SABR) announced it will host a live webcast of its second quarter 2026 earnings conference call on August 6, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET. Management will review financial results and provide commentary on the forward outlook, with the webcast accessible via the Investor Relations section of investors.sabre.com. A replay will be available for at least 90 days following the event.

feed.title: Old Dominion Freight Line raises quarterly dividend to $0.29 per share
feed.summary: Old Dominion Freight Line (ODFL) has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.29 per share, marking a 3.6% increase from the previous year's September dividend. This dividend is payable on September 16, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of September 2, 2026. This announcement includes standard forward-looking risk disclosures regarding operations and market factors.

feed.title: Carrier acquires building automation firm 75F
feed.summary: Carrier Global Corporation announced the acquisition of 75F, a building automation systems company specializing in cloud-native, wireless, and AI-enabled technology. This acquisition enhances Carrier's portfolio with 75F’s AI and auto-commissioning capabilities, aiming to create more autonomous and self-optimizing buildings. Deepinder Singh, founder of 75F, will continue as CEO of the acquired business.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (NVR) NVR, Inc. Reports Q2 Revenue $2.28B, vs. FactSet Est of $2.40B
feed.summary: NVR, Inc. reported its Q2 revenue at $2.28 billion, falling short of FactSet's estimate of $2.40 billion. The company, a leading U.S. homebuilder, has recently been added to several Russell Growth benchmarks and authorized a $750 million share buyback plan. Analysts currently maintain a "HOLD" consensus with an average target price of $7,052.00.

feed.title: Capital One Securities Adjusts VICI Properties PT to $36 From $39, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Capital One Securities has adjusted its price target for VICI Properties (VICI) from $39 to $36, while maintaining an Overweight rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a recent trend, as other firms like Barclays and Wells Fargo have also cut their price targets for VICI Properties in July. Despite the revised target, the Overweight rating suggests continued positive sentiment from Capital One Securities regarding the real estate investment trust specializing in hospitality and entertainment properties.

feed.title: NVR Booked 9% More Home Orders as Q2 Settlements Fell 8%
feed.summary: NVR (NYSE: NVR) announced a decline in second-quarter 2026 net income and diluted EPS by 29% and 23% respectively, with consolidated revenues falling by 10% year-over-year. Despite a 9% increase in new home orders, settlements decreased by 8%, and the homebuilding gross margin narrowed due to higher lot costs and affordability pressures. The company also reported a decrease in mortgage banking closed loan production and a significant share repurchase program.

feed.title: NVR, INC. ANNOUNCES SECOND QUARTER RESULTS
feed.summary: NVR, Inc. announced its second-quarter 2026 results, showing a decrease in net income and diluted earnings per share by 29% and 23% respectively, compared to Q2 2025. Consolidated revenues also fell by 10% to $2.33 billion. Despite these declines, new orders for homebuilding increased by 9%, while settlements decreased by 8%.

feed.title: Socket Mobile Announces Second Quarter 2026 Results Release Date and Conference Call
feed.summary: Socket Mobile, Inc. (SCKT) announced it will release its second-quarter 2026 financial results on Thursday, July 30, 2026, after the market closes. The company will also host a conference call at 5 p.m. Eastern Time to discuss these results. Details for joining the online or dial-in conference call were provided.

feed.title: Socket Mobile sets July 30 call to discuss second-quarter results
feed.summary: Socket Mobile (NASDAQ: SCKT) announced it will release its second-quarter 2026 financial results after the market closes on Thursday, July 30, 2026. The company will also host a conference call on the same day at 5 p.m. Eastern Time (2 p.m. Pacific Time) to discuss the results. Investors can join the call online via RingCentral or by dialing in.

feed.title: Oceania Cruises Pairs Bangkok Tai Chi With Santorini Yoga
feed.summary: Oceania Cruises is expanding its wellness offerings with over 50 "Wellness Discovery Tours" across Asia, Europe, and South America, integrating local traditions like tai chi, dance therapy, and yoga. These small-group shore excursions are designed to complement onboard enrichment activities, providing guests with cultural immersion and personal well-being experiences. The initiative aims to cater to luxury travelers seeking transformative journeys that combine exploration with health and mindfulness.

feed.title: Bank of America extends naming rights deal for Panthers stadium amid $1.3B renovation
feed.summary: Bank of America has extended its naming rights deal for the Carolina Panthers' stadium, which is currently undergoing a significant $1.3 billion renovation. This agreement ensures the continued branding of the venue, which hosted 47 events last year, a substantial increase from 15 in 2018. The extended partnership aligns with the ongoing investment in the stadium's upgrade and its growing event calendar.

feed.title: Cogeco mobile customers get financing, protection and trade-ins for devices
feed.summary: Assurant and Cogeco Communications Inc. have partnered to offer Canadian mobile customers a comprehensive device solution, including access to network-compatible devices, flexible financing, protection, and trade-in options. This collaboration aims to make mobile ownership more affordable, flexible, and sustainable, addressing the growing demand for convenience and value in the mobile device lifecycle. The solution allows customers to browse and purchase devices, including new, refurbished, and certified Open Box models, directly through BestBuy.ca, with integrated device lifecycle management from Assurant.

feed.title: SINTX Taps 30-Year MedTech Veteran to Evaluate Opportunities
feed.summary: SINTX Technologies has engaged Southern Metrics Consulting, led by SINTX director Chris Lyons, to establish a Strategic Opportunity Management Program. This program aims to identify, evaluate, and pursue strategic opportunities such as commercial partnerships, licensing deals, and acquisitions to support long-term growth and enhance stockholder value. The initiative marks a key step in SINTX's evolution from a biomaterials developer to a commercial-stage medical technology company.

feed.title: Sagtec launches Sage AI after securing a $1.1M deployment
feed.summary: Sagtec Global's CEO, Ng Chen Lok, outlined strategic and financial progress for the first half of 2026, building on a record FY2025 with $19.1 million revenue. The company launched its Sage AI enterprise platform, securing a $1.1 million deployment, and introduced the Halo AI POS System with a target of 10,000 subscribers by 2027. Sagtec is also evaluating a potential spin-off of its subsidiary, CL Technologies, to enhance strategic flexibility and capital access.

feed.title: Target Beats Tobacco Fee Suit as Judge Rebuffs Agency Guidance
feed.summary: A federal judge ruled in favor of Target Corp., upholding its practice of charging annual health care penalties to tobacco-using employees. The judge declined to defer to US Labor Department guidance, stating that Target's $800 annual penalty for smokers is an "all-or-nothing" proposition where workers can avoid the entire fee if they qualify for an exemption. This decision dismisses a lawsuit that accused Target of not reimbursing penalties for workers who later quit smoking.

feed.title: BlackRock, Coinbase, Strategy in group pledging $15 million to prepare Bitcoin for quantum threats
feed.summary: A consortium of nine companies, including BlackRock, Coinbase, and Strategy, has pledged $15 million over three years to fund Bitcoin security research and open-source development, specifically focusing on preparing for quantum computing threats. Each member will independently direct their funding, emphasizing that the group will not intervene in Bitcoin's governance or protocol decisions. This initiative aims to support post-quantum research as developers work on protections against future advances in quantum computing, which could potentially break current Bitcoin cryptography.

feed.title: NYSE Content Update: Fourth Annual AI x Bio Summit to Commence at the NYSE – Company Announcement
feed.summary: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) announced its pre-market update for July 23, 2026, highlighting the Fourth Annual AI x Bio Summit. Key participants will include Arkaea Media Group CEO Mo Islam, Decoding Bio Co-Founder Amee Kapadia, and Similarweb's Scott Trabucco, discussing market insights and data analysis. The update also noted market reactions to escalating tensions in the Middle East, with ICE Brent Crude Oil trading at $99 a barrel.

feed.title: Oppenheimer Adjusts Corteva Price Target to $95 From $89, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Oppenheimer has increased its price target for Corteva (CTVA) to $95 from $89, reiterating an Outperform rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects analyst confidence in the agricultural chemicals company. Other recent analyst actions also show upward revisions to Corteva's price targets.

feed.title: Sigma Lithium rises after moving to settle dispute with Minas Gerais government (SGML:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Sigma Lithium (SGML) stock rose by 3.8% pre-market after announcing negotiations with the Minas Gerais state government to settle a dispute. The dispute involves fines totaling approximately US$540,000 for environmental issues that occurred between 2013 and 2022. The company is working towards a "terms for adjustment of procedures" agreement.

feed.title: Truist Financial sells $1.25B 4.957% fixed-to-floating notes due 2030
feed.summary: Truist Financial (TFC) has issued $1.25 billion in 4.957% Fixed-to-Floating Rate Medium-Term Notes, Series I, which are set to mature on July 23, 2030. This offering provides long-term funding for the company and is registered under the Securities Act via Form S-3. A legal opinion from Mayer Brown LLP regarding the issuance has been filed and incorporated into the registration statement.

feed.title: NextEra Energy (NEE) Receives a Buy from Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley analyst David Arcaro maintained a Buy rating on NextEra Energy (NEE) with a price target of $116.00. This follows BMO Capital's Buy rating, although Bank of America Securities maintained a Hold rating earlier. NextEra Energy reported strong quarterly results with revenues of $6.96 billion and a net profit of $2.18 billion.

feed.title: Honeywell International Inc. Reports Earnings Results for the Second Quarter and Six Months Ended June 30, 2026
feed.summary: Honeywell International Inc. reported strong financial results for the second quarter and six months ended June 30, 2026. For Q2 2026, revenue increased to USD 9,719 million from USD 9,322 million year-over-year, and net income significantly rose to USD 5,682 million from USD 1,570 million. The company's diluted EPS from continuing operations also saw a substantial increase for both the quarter and the six-month period.

feed.title: INVESTOR DEADLINE APPROACHING: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Reminds Intuit (INTU) Investors of Securities Class Action Lawsuit Deadline on September 8, 2026
feed.summary: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP has reminded investors of the approaching September 8, 2026 deadline to seek lead plaintiff status in a federal securities class action lawsuit against Intuit Inc. (NASDAQ: INTU). The lawsuit alleges that Intuit made false or misleading statements regarding its competitive advantages, growth, and business model sustainability, particularly concerning its TurboTax business. This follows a May 20, 2026 announcement where Intuit revised down its FY 2026 TurboTax revenue growth guidance, causing a significant drop in its stock price.
